# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 80 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.listener.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match: { prefix: "/api/v1/users" }
                route:
                  cluster: user_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match: { prefix: "/api/v1/products" }
                route:
                  cluster: product_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match: { prefix: "/api/v1/orders" }
                route:
                  cluster: order_service
                  timeout: 30s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
  clusters:
  - name: user_service
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    connect_timeout: 5s
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address: { address: user-service, port_value: 8080 }
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - http_health_check:
        path: /health
        expected_statuses:
        - 200
        - 204
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
    http2_protocol_options: {}
  - name: product_service
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    connect_timeout: 5s
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address: { address: product-service, port_value: 8080 }
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - http_health_check:
        path: /health
        expected_statuses:
        - 200
        - 204
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
    http2_protocol_options: {}
  - name: order_service
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    connect_timeout: 5s
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address: { address: order-service, port_value: 8080 }
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - http_health_check:
        path: /health
        expected_statuses:
        - 200
        - 204
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
    http2_protocol_options: {}
